details: The agent navigated to https://github.com/torvalds/linux/blob/master/Makefile, successfully extracted the actual content using JavaScript evaluation, and correctly reported VERSION = 7 and PATCHLEVEL = 0 from the real page content. The extracted text also shows EXTRAVERSION = -rc6 and NAME = Baby Opossum Posse, confirming the agent read actual page data rather than hallucinating.
